title: scaevola paludosa
intro: Scaevola paludosa, also known as swamp fan flower or fan flower, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Scaevola paludosa include its potential to reduce pain, inflammation, and improve wound healing. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
